channel.title: Comments on: Alaskan Brewing Company: Alaskan Amber, Ep. 154
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks for the comments Marco. There are plenty of really great Canadian beers and I'm sorry we haven't discussed any at this point. Doesn't mean it won't happen :) I'd love to do Celebration but I'm not sure when John and I will get together again and record episodes. All I know is that it has to be in the next few months or I'm out of episodes. Hope you have a happy holiday!!!
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for the comments Marco. There are plenty of really great Canadian beers and I’m sorry we haven’t discussed any at this point. Doesn’t mean it won’t happen 🙂
I’d love to do Celebration but I’m not sure when John and I will get together again and record episodes. All I know is that it has to be in the next few months or I’m out of episodes. Hope you have a happy holiday!!!

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Nice show guys. Any chance you can do a show on the Sierra Nevada Celebration? I brew a clone of this wonderful IPA (it's hard to tell the difference between them) and I think that it's one of the best AIPA beers in the USA. Paul, you asked me months ago if I had some beers from Canada that I could suggest for your show... I sent you a list but maybe during your move, it got lost? hhehe no worries, I can send it again BUT let's start with this beer that's from south of the border and one that I usually have on tap at home all the time.
Keep up the good work! CHEERS, Marco in Montreal
item.content:encoded:
Nice show guys. Any chance you can do a show on the Sierra Nevada Celebration? I brew a clone of this wonderful IPA (it’s hard to tell the difference between them) and I think that it’s one of the best AIPA beers in the USA.
Paul, you asked me months ago if I had some beers from Canada that I could suggest for your show… I sent you a list but maybe during your move, it got lost? hhehe no worries, I can send it again BUT let’s start with this beer that’s from south of the border and one that I usually have on tap at home all the time.

Keep up the good work!
CHEERS,
Marco in Montreal
